sub_modules.gaussian3x3_blur: Combinational 3x3 Gaussian stencil using fixed 1-2-1/2-4-2/1-2-1 coefficients divided by 16.
sub_modules.high_frequency_subtract: Combinational pointwise subtraction computing original minus blurred pixel.
sub_modules.gain_scale: Combinational signed scaling of the high-frequency component by the runtime gain input.
sub_modules.sharpen_reconstruct: Combinational pointwise reconstruction adding the scaled high-frequency term back to the original pixel.
sub_modules.saturate_pixel: Combinational clamp from signed reconstructed value to the PIXEL_W output range.
